'''takala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobbernoul|jobbernoul]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobbernoul|jobbernoul]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| takala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækælæth|tækælæth]] || [[word:tækælæj|tækælæj]] || [[word:tækælæsh|tækælæsh]] || [[word:tækælæ|tækælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:takakalath|takakalath]] || [[word:takakalaj|takakalaj]] || [[word:takakalash|takakalash]] || [[word:takakala|takakala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:takalath|takalath]] || [[word:takalaj|takalaj]] || [[word:takalash|takalash]] || [[word:takala|takala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:takaflath|takaflath]] || [[word:takaflaj|takaflaj]] || [[word:takaflash|takaflash]] || [[word:takaflaf|takaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takalatha|takalatha]] || [[word:takalaja|takalaja]] || [[word:takalasha|takalasha]] || [[word:takalaka|takalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takalath|takalath]] || [[word:takalaj|takalaj]] || [[word:takalash|takalash]] || [[word:takala|takala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takalathal|takalathal]] || [[word:takalajal|takalajal]] || [[word:takalashal|takalashal]] || [[word:takalakal|takalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takalathatha|takalathatha]] || [[word:takalajaja|takalajaja]] || [[word:takalashasha|takalashasha]] || [[word:takalaka|takalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takalathan|takalathan]] || [[word:takalajan|takalajan]] || [[word:takalashan|takalashan]] || [[word:takalakan|takalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takalathaoro|takalathaoro]] || [[word:takalajaoro|takalajaoro]] || [[word:takalashaoro|takalashaoro]] || [[word:takalakaoro|takalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
